case_title: PERSOLVE LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA VS. CECELIA HENRY et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CECELIA HENRY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION ENTERED INTO BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE HER PROPOSED ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CECELIA HENRY's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is Granted pursuant to the stipulation entered into between Plaintiff and Defendant.
